creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
Vi dumps core

Fix: 

Don't do it. Its a silly thing to do anyway.  ;-)
How-To-Repeat: 
Edit this file:

------------------------------------8<--8<---------------------
NEXT LINE EMPTY

PREVIOUS LINE EMPTY
------------------------------------8<--8<---------------------

Put the cursor on the empty line and type d$ (delete to end of line).
Instant core dump. y$ does not do it.
